subject: Database Management & Warehousing
question: Distributive measure example:
explanation: Distributive: can compute aggregate from partial aggregates. SUM of sums = total SUM.

subject: Database Management & Warehousing
question: Algebraic measure example:
explanation: Algebraic: computed from finite number of distributive measures. AVG = SUM/COUNT.

subject: Database Management & Warehousing
question: Holistic measure:
explanation: Holistic: no constant-bound sub-aggregation method. Must see all data. E.g., median.

subject: Database Management & Warehousing
question: Additive measure:
options: Can be summed across all dimensions
explanation: Additive measures (e.g., sales amount) can be meaningfully summed across any dimension.
